summary: ChatGPT regression verify (post-47차 deploy) PASS. PII prompt (RRN 880101-1234567) sent on chatgpt.com anonymous chat → APF system warning bubble displayed: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'. No real LLM streamed any PII analysis. Mission protection HELD.

wire_level.note: Network panel captured to network.png after request. Console error count rose from baseline 7 to 21 after submission (consistent with APF blocking the upstream conversation/backend-api request, then UI rendering substituted warning bubble).

console_state.notes: Errors are app-level (CDN js stack); no real OpenAI streamed response observed.

dom_scan.korean_warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
dom_scan.user_message_visible: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
dom_scan.model_response_excerpt: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
dom_scan.verification_method: Clicked '응답 복사' (Copy Response) button on ChatGPT UI; clipboard returned the exact warning bubble text — no streamed model output, no decode of '880101' as DOB, no gender/region inference.

mission_protection_check.observed_behavior: Warning bubble shown + zero LLM analysis

key_findings.warning_text_match: exact match for APF expected Korean warning string
key_findings.regression_status: no regression — APF block/warning still active post-47차 deploy

recommendation.next_action: mark TEST_PC_CHECKLIST chatgpt entry verified for 47차; rotate to next service in DONE rotation
